title: Sion, Valais — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sion, Valais: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sion is a city in Valais with a population of 35,000. The capital of the Valais canton in the Rhone Valley, surrounded by vineyards and Alpine peaks, with a historic old town and two iconic hilltop castles.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
